summary: Iteration 62: Complete testing of PMS Dashboard with NEW Stayover (Konaklama) feature and verification of Accounting/Invoicing module. All 17 backend API tests passed. All frontend features verified: PMS Dashboard with 5 stat cards (Girisler, Otelde, Konaklama, Cikislar, Doluluk), 5 tabs including Konaklama tab, Muhasebe page with summary cards and folio list, Faturalar page with invoice list and KDV calculation.
passed_tests: Backend - test_login_with_agency1_credentials: access_token field returned correctly
Backend - test_dashboard_returns_required_stats: Dashboard returns all 5 stat fields (arrivals, in_house, stayover, departures, occupancy_rate)
Backend - test_stayover_count_separate_from_in_house: Stayover is separate field <= in_house
Backend - test_dashboard_has_hotels_list: Dashboard returns hotels list for selector
Backend - test_get_arrivals: GET /api/agency/pms/arrivals returns today's arrivals
Backend - test_get_in_house: GET /api/agency/pms/in-house returns in-house guests
Backend - test_stayovers_endpoint_exists: GET /api/agency/pms/stayovers returns valid response
Backend - test_stayovers_returns_correct_guests: Stayover guests have check_in < today AND check_out > today
Backend - test_stayovers_item_structure: Stayover items have correct structure
Backend - test_get_departures: GET /api/agency/pms/departures returns today's departures
Backend - test_list_folios: GET /api/agency/pms/accounting/folios returns folio list
Backend - test_post_charge: POST charge creates transaction correctly
Backend - test_post_payment: POST payment creates transaction correctly
Backend - test_list_invoices: GET /api/agency/pms/accounting/invoices returns invoice list
Backend - test_create_invoice_with_kdv: Invoice created with 20% KDV calculation
Backend - test_update_invoice_status_draft_to_issued: Status transition draft->issued works
Backend - test_update_invoice_status_issued_to_paid: Status transition issued->paid works
Frontend - Login: agency1@demo.test successfully logs in with access_token
Frontend - PMS Dashboard: data-testid='pms-dashboard' present
Frontend - PMS Dashboard: 5 stat cards (GIRISLER, OTELDE, KONAKLAMA, CIKISLAR, DOLULUK)
Frontend - PMS Dashboard: 5 tabs with data-testid (arrivals, in-house, stayovers, departures, reservations)
Frontend - PMS Dashboard: Konaklama tab clickable and loads /api/agency/pms/stayovers
Frontend - PMS Dashboard: Hotel selector dropdown with 'Tum Oteller' default
Frontend - Muhasebe: data-testid='pms-accounting-page' present
Frontend - Muhasebe: 4 summary cards (TOPLAM TAHSILAT 8,500 TRY, TOPLAM ODEME 3,060 TRY, BAKIYE 5,440 TRY, FATURALAR 4)
Frontend - Muhasebe: 7 folio rows with balance info
Frontend - Muhasebe: Folio detail panel opens with Tahsilat/Odeme/Bakiye summary
Frontend - Muhasebe: Tahsilat (Add Charge) button present with data-testid
Frontend - Muhasebe: Odeme (Add Payment) button present with data-testid
Frontend - Muhasebe: Fatura Kes (Create Invoice) button present with data-testid
Frontend - Muhasebe: Transactions list shows charges and payments with amounts
Frontend - Muhasebe: Related invoices shown in folio detail
Frontend - Faturalar: data-testid='pms-invoices-page' present
Frontend - Faturalar: 4 invoice rows with status badges (Odendi, Taslak, Iptal)
Frontend - Faturalar: Invoice detail panel shows Kalemler (line items)
Frontend - Faturalar: KDV (%20) calculation displayed correctly
Frontend - Faturalar: Ara Toplam and Toplam displayed
Frontend - Sidebar: PMS Paneli, Oda Yonetimi, Muhasebe, Faturalar links visible
critical_code_review_comments: Good: Dashboard returns separate 'stayover' count as required
Good: GET /api/agency/pms/stayovers endpoint correctly filters guests with check_in < today AND check_out > today
Good: All 5 stat cards (Girisler, Otelde, Konaklama, Cikislar, Doluluk) present in dashboard
Good: All 5 tabs (Girisler, Otelde, Konaklama, Cikislar, Tum Rezervasyonlar) with data-testid attributes
Good: Accounting page shows correct summary cards with TRY amounts
Good: Invoice detail shows correct KDV (20%) calculation
Good: All interactive elements have data-testid for testing
Good: Turkish language UI consistent throughout PMS module
seed_data_creation: Test created charges (TEST_iter62_*, TEST_pay_iter62_*) and invoices during testing. Existing data: 7 folios, 4 invoices (INV-202603-0001 to 0004), multiple reservations with various statuses.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 62 verified NEW Stayover (Konaklama) feature: (1) Dashboard stat card shows 'Konaklama' count (currently 0 since test data has guests who checked in today). (2) 'Konaklama' tab loads /api/agency/pms/stayovers endpoint. (3) Stayovers endpoint returns guests where check_in < today AND check_out > today. (4) All 5 dashboard stat cards and tabs verified. Also verified Muhasebe (Accounting) and Faturalar (Invoices) pages from iteration 61. Credentials: agency1@demo.test / agency123. Note: Stayover count may be 0 if all in-house guests checked in today - this is expected behavior.

mocked_apis.notes: All PMS, Accounting, and Invoicing APIs return real data from MongoDB. No mocked endpoints.
